task: Retrieve LLM call cost from LiteLLM's bundled model_cost dict instead of calculating internally, adding litellm_model_name to LLMModel, extending get_model_cost() with litellm.model_cost lookup and YAML fallback, handling 4 edge cases, and rewriting broken test patches.

key_reasoning.reason: Five components touched across four layers: LLMModel config model (llm_config.py), map_litellm_to_llm_model() adapter (enterprise/litellm/models.py), get_model_cost() service (llm_service.py), TokensCalculationCallback (tokens_callback.py), and _parse_usage_with_cost() in proxy_router.py. Red flag applied: LLMModel is a core shared config object used across multiple layers and get_model_cost() is the single cost-retrieval gateway — bumped from L (4) to XL (5).

New lookup approach (litellm.model_cost) has no exact precedent in the codebase. get_model_cost() has no direct unit tests — only ever mocked. All existing mock patches in test_tokens_callback.py and test_proxy_router.py will break and require full rewrites. LLMModel schema change affects a core config object. Four edge cases (Bedrock region-prefix normalization, deepseek-r1 no base_model, newer models absent from dict, batch cost fields silently dropping) can fail silently. Gated by LLM_PROXY_ENABLED, so rollback is straightforward.

Production: llm_config.py, enterprise/litellm/models.py, llm_service.py (minimum 3; possibly tokens_callback.py and proxy_router.py). Tests: test_tokens_callback.py (patch rewrites), test_proxy_router.py (patch rewrites), test_llm_service.py (new get_model_cost coverage), test_litellm_service.py (un-skip and update). Total 7-9 files across src/codemie/configs/, src/codemie/service/llm_service/, src/codemie/enterprise/litellm/, and four test directories.

Four distinct layers: Service (llm_service.py), Agent-Tool (tokens_callback.py callback), External/Integration (proxy_router.py and enterprise/litellm/models.py LiteLLM adapter), and Config/DB-Persistence (LLMModel Pydantic schema extended with litellm_model_name). No API layer changes, no SQL schema migration.

red_flags_applied: Component Scope bumped from L (4) to XL (5): touches core shared utilities — LLMModel is a core config object used across multiple layers and get_model_cost() is the single gateway for cost retrieval
